title: 信息悬浮窗
completionRule: Complete only when the reviewed AST prototype, every legacy Card control and label, automatic/custom size semantics, all runtime image/video/latency fields, drag/position replacement contract, canonical persistence, session and layer lifecycle, accessibility, scripted 1920x1080 visual evidence and bounded overlay/chunk/navigation performance have automated evidence. Field selection and auto-hide are frozen functional-scope additions, not falsely attributed to the legacy Card UI.

sourceUiInventory.title: AST 生成的 React 结构基线
acceptanceItems: prototype source hash 为 sha256:47bbb9b8824b6effc99211d400b5ad1520315cb91e2a6559e6dc3aaae4e844f1
prototype 保留 Fragment 与单一根内容容器
prototype 保留两个 Switch、透明度 number input、宽度 Slider、高度 Slider 和说明段落
prototype 保留 5 个本地设置字段与 sync/update 函数
prototype 保留 enabled/opacity/showBorder/width/height 的条件更新与 unchanged 短路
unsupported 节点为 $state、$effect、Svelte Switch/Slider 和 settingsManager
生产实现不得保留 Svelte rune、$lib import 或 GUI-only settingsManager

sourceUiInventory.title: 启用、透明度与边框控件
acceptanceItems: 启用悬浮窗 Switch 默认 false、位于标签右侧、scale-75
透明度 number input min=0、max=100、step=5、默认显示 85
透明度输入高 28px、宽 80px、text-xs，右侧重复显示整数百分比
输入以 parseFloat 解析；NaN 不更新；规范层将结果限制 0..1
opacity 默认 0.85
0% 表示仅文字无底色而不是隐藏内容
显示边框 Switch 默认 false、位于标签右侧、scale-75
说明精确为调节悬浮信息窗的背景透明度（0% - 100%，0% 为仅文字无底色）。
开关/数值变化只更新对应字段并保留其余配置
完全未变化时不触发写入

sourceUiInventory.title: 宽度、自动状态与边界
acceptanceItems: 宽度分组标签和值位于同一行
width undefined 时值标签显示自动
width 已设置时显示 n px
Slider type=single、min=120、max=1600、step=20、全宽
自动状态下 Slider thumb 投影 480，但不应仅因渲染写入 480
用户调整 Slider 后写入 120..1600 的自定义宽度
update API 中 width<=0 删除字段并恢复自动
旧 Card 没有可达的恢复自动控件，目标必须增加明确的自动/重置命令并记录视觉偏差
runtime undefined 时不设置 inline width，由内容自然决定
runtime 仍受 info-content max-width 70vw 限制

sourceUiInventory.title: 高度、自动状态与边界
acceptanceItems: 高度分组标签和值位于同一行
height undefined 时值标签显示自动
height 已设置时显示 n px
Slider type=single、min=32、max=600、step=8、全宽
自动状态下 Slider thumb 投影 56，但不应仅因渲染写入 56
用户调整 Slider 后写入 32..600 的自定义高度
update API 中 height<=0 删除字段并恢复自动
旧 Card 没有可达的恢复自动控件，目标必须增加明确的自动/重置命令并记录视觉偏差
runtime undefined 时不设置 inline height，由内容自然决定
固定高度时内容 overflow hidden 且不得撑破 overlay

sourceUiInventory.title: 图片、视频、文件与时间字段
acceptanceItems: 只有 enabled=true 且 imageInfo 非空时挂载层
图片显示 🖼️ badge，视频显示 🎬 badge
文件名始终显示、monospace、11px、font-semibold、最大 32vw、ellipsis，并以 title 提供完整值
width 和 height 同时存在时显示 width×height
视频 duration>0 时显示 m:ss 或 h:mm:ss
视频 frameRate 存在时四舍五入显示 nfps
视频 bitrate 以 Mbps/Kbps/bps 格式显示
videoCodec 显示为视频: codec，audioCodec 显示为音频: codec
createdAt 显示创建: 本地 zh-CN 日期时间
modifiedAt 显示修改: 本地 zh-CN 日期时间
无效日期保留原始字符串，缺失字段零 DOM
meta-row 支持 flex-wrap，字段缺失不留下空分隔符
功能摘要要求字段配置，但旧 Card 没有字段选择控件；目标字段显隐设置必须作为显式新增契约而非 legacy parity

sourceUiInventory.title: 传输、渲染与延迟追踪字段
acceptanceItems: latencyTrace 缺失时 latency-row 零 DOM
protocol 显示 🌐 协议直连并使用 protocol 样式
file-url 显示 📁 文件直连并使用 direct 样式
tempfile 显示 💾 临时文件
tempfile-url 显示 💾 临时URL
其余 source 显示 📡 IPC传输并使用 ipc 样式
renderMode=img 显示 🖼️img，否则显示 🎨canvas
loadMs 显示加载:nms，decodeMs 显示解码:nms，均四舍五入
totalMs<100 为 green，100..299 为 yellow，>=300 为 red
cacheHit=true 显示 ✓缓存
dataSize truthy 时显示四舍五入 KB
latency-row monospace 10px、flex-wrap、gap 8px
诊断字段更新不得触发媒体重取或 Reader frame 重挂

sourceUiInventory.title: 层位置、拖动、材质与 z-index
acceptanceItems: 层 position=absolute、pointer-events none、z-index=LayerZIndex.INFO+5
默认 left=50%、top=1rem、transform translate(-50%,0)
info-content pointer-events auto、border-radius 6px、font-size 12px、max-width 70vw
背景为 theme background 与 clamp(opacity,0,1) 的 alpha
showBorder 时使用 1px border/60%
info-inner padding 8px 12px、gap 12px、cursor move、user-select none、overflow hidden
旧拖动仅 mouse down/move/up，offset 为组件瞬态且不持久化
drag start preventDefault/stopPropagation，禁用状态不开始拖动
mouseup 清除 window mousemove/mouseup listener
旧从居中 transform 切为无 transform 可能产生锚点跳变；目标保持视觉位置连续
目标使用 PointerEvent、pointer capture、viewport 有界位置与 keyboard/touch 等价操作
功能摘要要求位置配置；目标将位置纳入 canonical settings，旧瞬态 offset 仅作为行为证据
功能摘要要求自动隐藏，但旧 Card/runtime 无实现；目标需定义 idle/focus/hover 时序或明确替代决策

sourceUiInventory.title: 旧 settings 与唯一规范 TOML
acceptanceItems: 旧设置路径为 view.infoOverlay
默认 enabled=false、opacity=0.85、showBorder=false、width/height undefined
viewer.toggleInfoOverlay 合并原对象并只翻转 enabled
旧 Card 对每个输入事件立即 settingsManager updateNestedSettings
XR 一次导入旧对象后只写 [nodes.neoview.view.info_overlay]
规范字段使用 snake_case、版本化、严格类型与范围
undefined/clear 宽高在 TOML 中具有可持久化的 auto 语义，重启不复活旧数值
局部 PATCH 保留未编辑字段及未知未来字段
Slider/drag 中仅本地或 DOM 预览，interaction end 至多一次串行原子 PATCH
number 输入 blur/change 或 debounce completion 合并写入
失败回滚最近确认值，迟到 hydrate/PATCH 不覆盖更新交互或 session
无变化更新零写入

sourceUiInventory.title: 层、session、Card 生命周期和可访问性
acceptanceItems: Card 隐藏/折叠时编辑订阅零挂载，overlay runtime 由 enabled/session 独立控制
enabled=false 或 imageInfo=null 时 overlay 零 DOM
Reader session 切换清除旧 imageInfo/latencyTrace 与拖动状态
infoPanel 与 settings listener 在 layer 销毁时取消
拖动中卸载也必须清除全局 move/up listener
迟到旧 session metadata/latency 不显示在新页面
Switch、number、Slider 和自动尺寸命令均有可访问名称与 visible focus
透明度 number 暴露 min/max/step/value，Slider 暴露 slider role 与 aria-valuetext 自动/n px
overlay 拖动 handle 具有 aria-label 拖动以移动信息条
旧 role=button tabindex=0 无键盘处理不充分，目标提供方向键/重置位置
overlay 不抢 Reader 导航焦点，不拦截其外部 pointer events
覆盖 disabled、no-session、no-info、image、video、partial metadata、latency、dragging、pending、error、rollback、disposed 状态

sourceUiInventory.title: Card 外壳、视觉证据与性能边界
acceptanceItems: Card ID infoOverlay、标题信息悬浮窗、Info 图标、默认 info Panel、canHide=true
CardRenderer 与 CardWindowContent 动态加载且共享缓存/外壳
共享外壳负责显隐、折叠、排序、移动、高度和独立窗口
Card 根 text-xs、muted foreground、space-y-2，保持旧控件顺序与密度
1920x1080 legacy screenshot 占位为 output/playwright/legacy-neoview-info-overlay-1920x1080.png
目标截图同时覆盖展开 Card、图片 overlay、视频/latency characterization
约束 Card 下 number/百分比/Slider 不重叠或横向溢出
overlay 固定/custom 尺寸在 viewport 内可读且长文件名 ellipsis
disabled/no-info 热路径为 O(1) 分支与零 overlay DOM
overlay DOM 与字段数 O(1)，metadata 更新不创建历史列表
拖动 pointermove 只改 DOM/transient state，结束一次配置 PATCH
overlay/Card 更新保持活动 img DOM、asset URL 与 decode path
Card editor 与 overlay runtime 分离 lazy chunks，editor 不进入 Reader entry
导航、metadata burst、drag、chunk 与 1920x1080 rendering 有显式预算
Windows 重验证严格串行

items.title: 审查可重复 AST TSX 原型
items.targetContract: The generated prototype preserves source hash, hierarchy, controls, attributes and events and explicitly replaces every Svelte/runtime-only node before production React work.
items.notes: Prototype exists; production review remains.

items.title: 启用信息悬浮层
items.targetContract: A default-off shared setting mounts the overlay only with a valid current media snapshot and unmounts it completely when disabled.
items.notes: Viewer toggle action updates the same canonical field.

items.title: 背景透明度 0..100%
items.targetContract: Preserve default 85%, 5% number step and strict 0..1 storage; zero removes background only and retains text.
items.notes: Invalid/non-finite input does not corrupt settings.

items.title: 显示信息层边框
items.targetContract: A default-off boolean toggles only the legacy 1px border/60% style without changing geometry or content.
items.notes: Border is not a substitute for focus indication.

items.title: 自动或 120..1600px 宽度
items.targetContract: Preserve automatic undefined size and custom 120..1600/20px values, with explicit reachable reset-to-auto and viewport-safe projection.
items.notes: Legacy auto slider display value is 480.

items.title: 自动或 32..600px 高度
items.targetContract: Preserve automatic undefined size and custom 32..600/8px values, with explicit reachable reset-to-auto and content-safe projection.
items.notes: Legacy auto slider display value is 56.

items.title: 恢复内容自动尺寸
items.targetContract: Users can independently clear width and height to canonical auto, represented by absent/null reset semantics that survive restart.
items.notes: Intentional UI completion: old update API could clear but old Card had no reachable command.

items.title: 严格尺寸与透明度边界
items.targetContract: Reject non-finite/mistyped values, clamp opacity 0..1, width 120..1600 and height 32..600, and distinguish explicit auto clear from omitted patch.
items.notes: Invalid fields fall back independently.

items.title: 图片/文件基础信息字段
items.targetContract: Render media badge, full/ellipsized file name and dimensions from one current-session media snapshot with zero placeholders for missing data.
items.notes: CLI/TUI expose the same snapshot fields without overlay styling.

items.title: 视频时长、帧率、码率与 codec
items.targetContract: For video snapshots, conditionally render formatted duration, fps, bitrate, video codec and audio codec using exact legacy formatting.
items.notes: Image snapshots render zero video-only DOM.

items.title: 创建与修改时间字段
items.targetContract: Conditionally render created/modified timestamps using local zh-CN formatting and preserve invalid source text without throwing.
items.notes: Shared raw timestamps remain locale-neutral in the DTO.

items.title: 传输、渲染、延迟与缓存字段
items.targetContract: Render exact data-source labels, render mode, load/decode/total timing thresholds, cache hit and KB size from a bounded current-frame trace.
items.notes: Trace is diagnostic only and must not create a second media path.

items.title: 配置悬浮层字段显隐
items.targetContract: The frozen functional scope requires field visibility controls for page number, dimensions, file name and available runtime metadata, backed by one shared field enum.
items.notes: No such legacy Card controls exist; this is an explicit scope-completion addition, not parity evidence.

items.title: 悬浮层尺寸、材质与默认位置
items.targetContract: Project canonical opacity/border/auto-or-fixed dimensions onto one absolute INFO+5 layer centered at top by default and bounded to the viewport.
items.notes: Overlay remains outside Reader frame identity.

items.title: 可恢复的有界悬浮层位置
items.targetContract: Expose resettable viewport-relative position through canonical settings while preserving centered/top defaults and stable geometry across resize.
items.notes: Legacy drag offsets were transient and mouse-only; functional scope explicitly requires position configuration.

items.title: 指针、触摸与键盘移动
items.targetContract: Use bounded PointerEvent/pointer-capture movement, DOM-only transient updates and one completion persistence, with keyboard reset/nudge equivalents and no anchor jump.
items.notes: Intentional improvement over legacy mouse window listeners and transform discontinuity.

items.title: 可配置自动隐藏
items.targetContract: Define a bounded auto-hide policy with enabled/delay/hover/focus behavior that preserves keyboard access and does not discard user visibility preference.
items.notes: Functional-scope addition: frozen legacy Card/runtime contains no auto-hide control or behavior.

items.title: 唯一规范 TOML 与原子更新
items.targetContract: Persist only [nodes.neoview.view.info_overlay] through strict serialized partial PATCH, preserving unknown fields, coalescing interactions and rolling back failures.
items.notes: No GUI-only runtime settings or per-input disk writes.

items.title: 一次导入旧 view.infoOverlay
items.targetContract: Import enabled, opacity, showBorder and optional width/height once, normalize each field, then prevent legacy settings from overriding canonical TOML.
items.notes: Absent width/height import as auto.

items.title: 共享配置、媒体快照与 latency DTO
items.targetContract: GUI, CLI and TUI share browser-safe versioned configuration and current-session media/trace snapshots with cancellation, generation and stale-result semantics.
items.notes: ReaderApp remains composition only and no Node builtin enters browser chunks.

items.title: Card、媒体、诊断与持久化状态
items.targetContract: Cover disabled, enabled-no-session, enabled-no-info, image, video, partial metadata, latency, auto/custom size, dragging, pending, error, rollback, stale and disposed states.
items.notes: Missing optional fields produce zero DOM rather than placeholders.

items.title: Card、layer、session、listener 与 pointer 释放
items.targetContract: Hidden editors do no work, disabled/no-info layer is zero DOM, session generations reject stale data and every settings/store/pointer/timer subscription is released on unmount.
items.notes: Pointer cleanup must also run if unmounted mid-drag.

items.title: 命名控件、值语义与移动等价操作
items.targetContract: Every switch/input/slider/reset is named and keyboard-operable; overlay movement supports keyboard/touch, exposes state and never steals Reader navigation focus.
items.notes: Legacy role=button/tabindex without keyboard handler is not sufficient.

items.title: 共享 Card 外壳与延迟加载
items.targetContract: infoOverlay retains its title, Info icon, info Panel default, hideability, shared Card/window behavior and independently deferred editor/runtime chunks.
items.notes: Editor code must not inflate Reader entry.

items.title: 旧版控件层级、标签与密度
items.targetContract: Preserve exact enabled/opacity/width/height/border ordering, Chinese labels, compact spacing, value text and explanatory copy, with explicit additions isolated and documented.
items.notes: Auto reset, field selection and auto-hide are additions, not silent replacements.

items.title: 约束 Card 与 overlay 响应式几何
items.targetContract: Controls never overlap or overflow at constrained Card widths, and auto/fixed overlay remains reachable/readable within desktop and resized viewports.
items.notes: Long file names ellipsize with accessible full text.

items.title: 1920x1080 脚本视觉证据
items.targetContract: Terminal scripts capture legacy and target expanded Card plus image/video/latency overlay at 1920x1080 and compare hierarchy, labels, size, material and position.
items.notes: Placeholder: output/playwright/legacy-neoview-info-overlay-1920x1080.png; use scripts, not in-app Browser.

items.title: Overlay 更新保持活动媒体身份
items.targetContract: Configuration, metadata updates, drag and layer mount/unmount never remount the active img/video, change its asset URL or create another decode path.
items.notes: Overlay is a sibling presentation layer.

items.title: 禁用路径、DOM、更新、写入与 chunk 预算
items.targetContract: Disabled/no-info is zero DOM, field rendering is O(1), metadata and drag work is bounded, pointermove is DOM-only, completion writes once and editor/runtime chunks stay deferred within explicit budgets.
items.notes: Heavy verification runs strictly serial on Windows.

items.title: 记录自动尺寸、位置、字段、隐藏与可访问性改进
items.targetContract: Document reachable auto reset, persistent bounded position, PointerEvent/keyboard movement, field-selection and auto-hide additions, strict config and end-only writes without removing legacy controls or runtime fields.
items.notes: Source gaps and functional-scope additions remain explicit until implemented and evidenced.
